NEA541: The STS 1/4-Zip Hoodie is New Era's athletic-department quarter-zip with a hood — the piece coaching staffs order to look coordinated on the sideline. Our biggest batches have gone to team programs; the chest panel takes an embroidered mark cleanly next to the sporty seaming.
NEA502: The French Terry Full-Zip Hoodie is New Era's retail-soft everyday zip — 46 separate orders through our shop, the reorder pattern of a piece people genuinely like wearing. French terry drapes lighter than standard fleece, which makes it the hoodie for offices, fan stores, and staff who live indoors.
NEA510: The Tri-Blend Fleece Pullover Hoodie is the soft one — New Era's tri-blend fleece has that broken-in, boutique-store hand that standard poly-cotton can't fake. It's a favorite for company stores and employee gifts; print it soft-hand or embroider it small and let the fabric do the talking.
NEA500: The French Terry Pullover Hoodie is the pullover half of New Era's lightweight fleece pair — softer and drapier than a work hoodie, made for fan gear and office wear. A hundred went out in one recent pair of orders; the smooth face takes both print and embroidery well.
NEA512: The Tri-Blend Fleece 1/4-Zip Pullover puts New Era's softest fleece under a zip collar — the quarter-zip for teams that want retail feel instead of corporate stiffness. Sixty-plus decorated; tone-on-tone embroidery suits it beautifully.
NEA122: The Sueded Cotton Blend Full-Zip Hoodie is finished with a sueded touch that reads premium the moment it's handled — New Era's step-up zip for company stores and gift tiers. Pair it with the women's LNEA122, our most-ordered women's New Era piece, for a program that fits everyone.
NEA515: The Stand Out 1/4-Zip is New Era's smooth-knit athletic quarter-zip — the coach's layer, clean enough for the front office. Fifty went out in its first big batches here; a left-chest embroidered logo finishes it like team-issue.
NEA523: The Venue Fleece 1/4-Zip Pullover is New Era's stadium-styled quarter-zip — athletic seaming, everyday fleece, a sideline look. It slots into team and booster programs alongside the brand's caps.
NEA141: The Thermal Full-Zip Hoodie brings waffle-knit texture to New Era's hoodie line — 15 of its 16 units sold in separate orders, the signature of a piece people pick for themselves. The thermal face gives embroidery a distinctive backdrop.
NEA511: The Tri-Blend Fleece Full-Zip Hoodie is the zip version of New Era's softest fleece — boutique hand, everyday utility. Company stores stock it in heathers with a small embroidered mark.
NEA550: The Comeback Fleece Pullover Hoodie is New Era's throwback-weight fleece — a sturdier, vintage-styled hoodie in the brand's fan-wear tradition. Made for big collegiate-style prints across the chest.
NEA526: The Heritage Fleece Full-Zip Hoodie carries New Era's vintage athletic styling in an easy-layering zip — fan-store fleece with the big-league label. Chest embroidery or a retro print both suit it.
NEA551: The Comeback Fleece Full-Zip Hoodie is the zip cut of New Era's throwback fleece — heavyweight feel, vintage athletics attitude. Booster clubs and team stores are its natural home.
NEA560: The Varsity Heavyweight Fleece Jacket is New Era's letterman-styled piece — snap front, heavyweight fleece, straight off the team bus. It's a statement gift item; left-chest embroidery plus a back print completes the varsity look.
NEA520: The Venue Fleece Pullover Hoodie is the hooded staple of New Era's stadium line — athletic detailing over everyday fleece. Team programs order it to match the Venue quarter-zip.
NEA501: The French Terry Crew is the hoodless cut of New Era's lightweight fleece — a soft everyday crewneck that layers clean and prints beautifully. The retail-sweatshirt look, with a big-league label.
NEA228: The Power 1/2-Zip is the layering piece of New Era's performance line — wicking knit under a half-zip collar, built for training staffs and active teams. Embroiders sharp on the chest.
NEA525: The Heritage Fleece Pullover Hoodie is New Era's vintage-athletics hoodie — the fan-store classic with the throwback collegiate feel. A bold chest print is the natural finish.
NEA527: The Heritage Fleece Pocket Crew adds a front pocket to New Era's vintage-styled crewneck — a detail that moves it from basic to boutique. Soft-hand prints and small embroidery both work.
NEA100: The Heritage Blend Crew Tee is New Era's soft everyday t-shirt — 53 separate orders through our shop, which for a tee means teams keep coming back. The smooth blended fabric prints like a dream and wears like retail, not giveaway.
NEA137: The Tri-Blend Hoodie is a hooded tee, not a sweatshirt — New Era's featherweight tri-blend with a hood, the gym-to-street layer younger crews actually want. Twenty-four separate orders say it's being picked on purpose. Soft-hand prints only; let it drape.
NEA135: The Tri-Blend Tee is New Era's softest shirt — the heathered, drapey tri-blend that turns a staff shirt into something people wear on Saturday. It took one 180-unit order here almost immediately; DTG and soft-hand screen prints both love it.
NEA140: The Thermal Long Sleeve brings waffle-knit texture to the long-sleeve tee — 19 of its 23 units sold one and two at a time, the pattern of a personal favorite. The thermal surface gives prints and embroidery a distinctive canvas.
NEA102: The Heritage Blend Long Sleeve Crew Tee is the covered-arms version of New Era's soft everyday tee — same smooth print surface, shoulder-season utility. Teams order it alongside the short sleeve in one artwork run.
NEA200: The Series Performance Crew Tee is New Era's wicking workout shirt — the practice-jersey alternative with a big-league label. Team programs and training staffs order it in team colors with printed numbers and marks.
NEA201: The Series Performance Long Sleeve is the cold-session cut of New Era's training tee — wicking fabric, full coverage. It rounds out a team's practice-wear program alongside the short sleeve.
NEA229: The Power Long Sleeve Hoodie is a hooded performance tee — New Era's wicking knit with a hood and thumb-friendly sleeves for training outdoors. A modern piece for athletic programs and running clubs.
NEA225: The Power Polo is New Era's performance polo — wicking knit with athletic lines, the sideline-to-office piece for coaching staffs and sports-adjacent businesses. Forty-plus decorated here; the smooth face embroiders sharp.
NEA301: The Slub Twist Polo brings textured, heathered yarn to New Era's polo line — visual depth that reads boutique rather than uniform. It's the polo for brands that want their staff looking retail-styled.
NEA220: The Diamond Era Full-Button Jersey is the real thing — New Era's performance baseball jersey with a full button front. Rec leagues, company softball teams, and tournament squads order it with printed numbers and embroidered or printed marks.
YNEA220: The youth cut of New Era's Diamond Era Full-Button Jersey — the same performance baseball build in kid sizes, so the whole league matches. Numbers, names, and team marks print cleanly.
YNEA221: The Youth Diamond Era 2-Button Jersey is the pullover version of New Era's kids' baseball jersey — easier on-off for the youngest divisions, same performance fabric. League programs order it by the roster.
YNEA200: The Youth Series Performance Crew Tee scales New Era's wicking training shirt to kid sizes — practice-wear for youth programs that want the big-league label on the gear bag.
NEA600: The Cage Short Sleeve 1/4-Zip Jacket is a true dugout piece — the short-sleeve pullover coaches and players wear for cage work and warmups. Half its units here sold as singles, the mark of players buying their own. Team logos embroider on the chest.
NEA601: The Coaches Jacket is New Era's classic sideline shell — snap front, wind-shedding, straight out of the team-sports playbook. Booster clubs and athletic departments order it with an embroidered program logo.
LNEA122: The Women's Sueded Cotton Blend Full-Zip Hoodie is our most-ordered women's New Era piece — 40 separate orders and climbing. The sueded finish feels a tier above standard fleece, and the tailored cut is why it out-orders the unisex version. Company stores should stock both.
LNEA502: The Women's French Terry Full-Zip Hoodie pairs with New Era's popular unisex terry zip — 24 separate orders here. Lighter than standard fleece, tailored through the body, and the go-to women's hoodie in our New Era program.
LNEA511: The Women's Tri-Blend Fleece Full-Zip Hoodie is the tailored cut of New Era's softest fleece — boutique hand, real women's fit. Eleven separate orders; company stores and staff-gift programs keep it moving.
LNEA510: The Women's Tri-Blend Fleece Pullover Hoodie brings the brand's softest fabric to a women's pullover — the hoodie that gets kept, not donated. Pairs with the unisex NEA510 in one program.
LNEA123: The Women's Sueded Cotton Blend Cowl Tee is a genuinely distinct piece — the sueded soft fabric under a draped cowl neck, closer to boutique retail than team gear. It's a company-store favorite for teams that want women's options beyond a smaller unisex tee.
LNEA101: The Women's Heritage Blend V-Neck Tee is the women's staple of New Era's tee line — 14 separate orders, soft blended fabric, a flattering V. It's the default women's shirt in our New Era programs.
LNEA141: The Women's Thermal Full-Zip Hoodie sold every one of its units in separate orders here — sixteen orders, sixteen personal picks. Waffle-knit texture, tailored fit, and a distinctive canvas for a small embroidered mark.
LNEA540: The Women's STS Full-Zip Hoodie is the tailored zip of New Era's athletic-department line — sideline styling, women's fit. Coaching staffs order it alongside the men's STS pieces.
LNEA541: The Women's STS 1/2-Zip is the tailored half-zip of New Era's sideline line — the coach's layer in a women's cut. Eight separate orders; it completes a matched staff program.
LNEA133: The Women's Tri-Blend Performance Cinch Tee mixes New Era's softest fabric with a cinched-side design — an athleisure piece, not a uniform. Studios and boutique-minded brands pick it for staff and retail.
LNEA515: The Women's Stand Out 1/4-Zip is the tailored version of New Era's smooth athletic quarter-zip — clean lines, women's fit, sideline-to-office range. Embroiders sharp at the chest.
LNEA500: The Women's French Terry Pullover Hoodie is the tailored pullover of New Era's lightweight terry line — soft, drapey, and made for company stores that carry real women's cuts.
LNEA301: The Women's Slub Twist Polo carries the textured, boutique-leaning knit of New Era's polo line in a women's cut — for teams that want their whole front line in the same distinctive fabric.
LNEA229: The Women's Power Long Sleeve Hoodie is the tailored hooded performance tee — wicking, light, made for training outdoors. Running clubs and fitness staffs order it with the men's version.
LNEA100: The Women's Heritage Blend Crew Tee is the crew-neck alternative to the popular women's V — same soft blended fabric, classic neckline. Ordered alongside the unisex NEA100 for full-team runs.
LNEA550: The Women's Comeback Fleece Pullover Hoodie is the tailored cut of New Era's throwback-weight fleece — vintage fan-wear attitude, real women's fit. Booster and alumni programs order the pair.
LNEA136: The Women's Tri-Blend 3/4-Sleeve Tee is the baseball-tee silhouette in New Era's softest fabric — a fan-store classic. Raglan sleeves in a contrast color make even simple prints look designed.
LNEA530: The Women's Performance Terry Full-Zip Cowl is an athleisure piece through and through — wicking terry with a draped cowl collar. It belongs in company stores and studio programs, not uniform closets, which is exactly its appeal.
LNEA225: The Women's Power Polo is the tailored cut of New Era's performance polo — wicking knit, women's fit, sideline-ready. It completes a coaching-staff program alongside the men's NEA225.
LNEA228: The Women's Power 1/2-Zip is the tailored layering piece of New Era's performance line — half-zip collar, wicking knit, training-day utility with front-office polish.
LNEA533: The Women's Performance Terry Short Sleeve Hoodie is the most athleisure piece in the line — a short-sleeve hooded terry layer for studios, gyms, and brands that sell a lifestyle. Small tonal embroidery finishes it right.
NEB201: The Legacy Backpack carries New Era's big-league branding into everyday carry — nine of its ten units here sold in separate orders, the signature of a deliberate gift pick. Padded, organized, and the front panel takes an embroidered logo cleanly.
NEB202: New Era's current Legacy Backpack — the refreshed model of the brand's everyday pack. Team-store styling, real organization, and a front panel made for an embroidered mark.
NEB600: The Game Day Cinch is New Era's stadium-ready cinch bag — light, simple, and sized for the essentials. Teams and events order them in bulk with a printed logo; they cost little and travel everywhere.
NEB700: The Shutout Duffel is New Era's team gear bag — practice-to-tournament capacity with dugout styling. An embroidered or printed team mark on the side panel makes the pile at the bench sortable.
NEB701: The Shutout Wheeled Bat Bag is the serious one — New Era's rolling baseball/softball equipment bag with dedicated bat storage. League and travel-team programs order them logoed; players keep them for years.
